steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states the program identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases and has already-strong performance that will improve further. These phrases signal consistent, successful operation.

steps.title: Match the word to the context
steps.content:
The program needs to mean it ______ identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases — the blank describes how consistently it performed. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — clumsily: awkwardly or poorly — contradicts the "vast majority" success rate and "already-strong performance." ✗
  • Choice B — reliably: consistently and dependably — matches a program that identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases with already-strong performance. ✓
  • Choice C — rarely: infrequently — directly contradicts "the vast majority of cases." ✗
  • Choice D — slowly: at a low speed — the passage says nothing about processing speed, only accuracy. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
